docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID DBA   MIDAS AUTO AND TIRE SHOP $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, DEALER'S ESTIMATE FOR TIMING CHAIN REPAIR IS $3600, AND GEICO IS LIABLE FOR NOT AUTHORIZING THIS WORK, WHILE MIDAS IS EQUALLY LIABLE FOR INSTALLING A DEFECTIVE ENGINE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2019 BY PAUL K. STEWART; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT RICHARDSON, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PANG, DAVID DBA   MIDAS AUTO AND TIRE SHOP $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, MR. RICHARDSON WAS ENTITLED TO RECEIVE A PROPERLY FUNCTIONING ENGINE TO REPLACE HIS PRIOR ENGINE DAMAGED IN AN ACCIDENT. APPELLANT INSTALLED AN ENGINE WITH A TIMING CHAIN PROBLEM. FIXING AND/OR REPLACING THE TIMING CHAIN IS NOT PREVENTATIVE MAINTENANCE, IT IS FIXING A DEFECT. BOTH GEICO AND APPELLANT WERE RESPONSIBLE FOR PROVIDING A PROPERLY FUNCTIONING REPLACEMENT ENGINE, NOT ONE WITH A DEFECT SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2019 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-03-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR APPEARED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGMENT CREDITOR EXPECTS TO BE PAID TODAY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
